prompt: Candid documentary-style photo, magazine-cover quality. A young male musician with curly hair walks out of a classic corner bodega late at night, a weathered guitar case hanging from his shoulder. Dual-temperature street lighting: an illuminated neon "OPEN" sign throws a deep red-orange glow across his face, while a warm yellow sodium streetlight backlights him from behind. Shot on a Canon AE-1, 50mm f/1.4 at maximum aperture, CineStill 800T film emulation. Soft red halation halos emanate from every neon source, tungsten color balance, and shadows carry a slight green-teal cast. Shallow depth of field, bokeh background. Cinematic night photography, photorealistic, highly detailed.
